title: Ops Preflight Verdict
description: Layer 3 Codex deep-review output for a single Bash command flagged by Layer 2 as state-changing. Strict-mode compliant per v2.1.0 Bug 1 lesson: additionalProperties:false and required matches properties exactly.

verdict.description: The reviewer's pre-execution recommendation. 'block' means do not run; 'request_changes' means modify the command or prep first.

risk.description: Deep-review risk classification (narrower than the Layer 2 classifier's enum — Layer 3 is only called for commands that already escalated).

findings.description: Specific operational concerns the reviewer identified. Empty array when approve.

required_prechecks.description: Concrete shell commands or actions the operator must run BEFORE the proposed command. Empty array when no prechecks needed.

required_postchecks.description: Concrete shell commands the operator must run AFTER the proposed command to confirm health. Empty array if not applicable.

rollback.description: Concrete rollback commands if the proposed command goes wrong. Empty array if reviewer says no rollback needed (e.g. read-only).

human_summary.description: One or two plain sentences the operator sees. No speculation, no fixes — just the bottom line.
